title: Teen numbers
description: Practice thinking of teen numbers as a ten plus some ones.

assessment_items.question_content:
Here are $10$ whales:  
![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/209d70fb75325b45719b9797d64d61fc.png)  

We want $13$ whales.  
 
**We need [[☃ input-number 1]] more whales.**
hints: We need $\blue3$ more whales to make $13$.

assessment_items.question_content:
Here are $10$ squirrels:  
![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/de9c21534b6db75aa7f206f84bdb5a93.png)

We want $15$ squirrels.

**We need [[☃ input-number 1]] more squirrels.**
hints: We need $\purple5$ more squirrels to make $15$.

assessment_items.question_content:

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b1f155081824694f2110c9acae11ccda.png)  

We want $16$ bananas.

**We need [[☃ input-number 1]] more bananas.**
hints: We need $\green6$ more bananas to make $16$.

assessment_items.question_content:
Here are $10$ ponies:  
![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/01c217767f7b13540f40f476483d972c.png)  

We want $17$ ponies.  
 
**We need [[☃ input-number 1]] more ponies.**
hints: We need $\pink7$ more ponies to make $17$.

assessment_items.question_content:
Here are $10$ foxes:  
![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/80adf9863424de75cd9fa917004c76f1.png)  

We want $19$ foxes.

**We need [[☃ input-number 1]] more foxes.**
hints: We need $\green9$ more foxes to make $19$.

assessment_items.question_content:
**How should we fill the second ten grid to make $18$?**

![A grid with 10 sections. A blue dot is in each section.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/8b9ca4e9afe46e328cbe7e01116c4d4ccccc81ea) 

![A blank grid with 10 sections.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/0ce4e04d857db5e38aac7f81a5df8c9cce2e23d6)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
$18 = \blueD{10} + \purpleC8$

We need to show $\purpleC8$ in the second ten grid.

The answer

![A grid with 10 sections. A purple dot is in 8 of the sections.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/339ee55360304c2a95fa0ad7f499d09782ef5f4b)

![A grid with 10 sections. A red dot is in 4 of the sections.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/bac5c9773b3000ef3fd4f73c36a173058573886f)
